events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the observed condition — free conductor under 6 in. at a box — is a direct violation of NEC 300.14, which mandates at least 6 in. of free conductor at outlet/junction/switch points for safe termination. Decision is `fail` (medium risk, correctable rough-in defect) with corrective actions to pull additional slack, re-verify box fill per 314.16, re-terminate, and reinspect before closeout.
